heroTitulo: I develop web experiences with a visual and functional focus.
heroDescripcion: Frontend developer focused on clean design, usability, and attractive web interfaces.
proyectosDescripcionTerraViva: Development of a web booking platform for rural accommodations, designed with a focus on usability, accessibility, and responsive design.
proyectosDescripcionBurgueHub: E-commerce website for a burger shop with localStorage persistence (hackathon project).
proyectosDescripcionToDoList: Responsive task management app focused on interaction design (IxD) and a seamless, intuitive user experience (UX).
sobreMiTitulo: It's not about impressing; it's about communicating.
sobreMiPrimerTexto: I am a Full Stack Java Developer.
sobreMiSegundoTexto: I have experience in technical support, data networking, and teaching, which has allowed me to develop strong technical skills, effective communication, and problem-solving abilities.
sobreMiTercerTexto: I am interested in creating interfaces that can be used by as many people as possible. That is why this portfolio incorporates web accessibility best practices, such as keyboard navigation, semantic tags, proper contrast, and a colorblind-friendly palette.
sobreMiCuartoTexto: I am currently continuously learning and improving my skills in web development, as well as backend development with Java and Spring Boot.
educacionTecnicoDescripcion: My first step into the tech world, focused on IT support, hardware maintenance, and switch configuration.
educacionTecnologo: Associate Degree in Data Network Management
educacionTecnologoDescripcion: Specialized in networking, servers, infrastructure, and solving technical issues.
educacionPlatziDescripcion: Continuous education at Platzi, focusing on Full Stack development, keeping pace with technological updates, and constantly strengthening practical skills.
educacionUnadDescripcion: University education focused on software development and logical thinking.
educacionGenerationDescripcion: Intensive training in Java, Spring Boot, and web development.
contactoDescripcionLarga: IWhether you have an idea, are looking to collaborate, or just want to talk about tech, I'd love to hear from you.
footerDescripcion: I develop web experiences where design and functionality work together.
